ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: In the past year, have you tried or used: Cigarettes (even one or two puffs)?
In the past year, have you tried or used: Vapes with nicotine, e-cigarettes, e-cigars, e-pipes, e-hookahs, and personal vaporizers?
In the past year, have you tried or used: Traditional cigars, cigarillos, or filtered cigars?
In the past year, have you tried or used: Tobacco pipes?
In the past year, have you tried or used: Tobacco in a hookah or water pipe?
In the past year, have you tried or used: Smokeless tobacco or snus such as snus pouches, loose snus, moist snuff, dip, spit, and chewing tobacco?
In the past year, have you tried or used: Bidis (small brown cigarettes wrapped in a leaf and typically tied on one or both ends with string) or kreteks (clove cigarettes)?
In the past year, have you used this fairly regularly? Cigarettes
In the past year, have you used this fairly regularly? Vapes with nicotine, e-cigarettes, e-cigars, e-pipes, e-hookahs, and personal vaporizers
In the past year, have you used this fairly regularly? Traditional cigars, cigarillos, or filtered cigars
In the past year, have you used this fairly regularly? Tobacco pipes
In the past year, have you used this fairly regularly? Tobacco in a hookah or water pipe
In the past year, have you used this fairly regularly? Smokeless tobacco or snus
In the past year, have you used this fairly regularly? Bidis or kreteks
When was the last time you used this, in any amount? Cigarettes (even one or two puffs)
Notes: 1= Not in the past 6 months but sometime in the past year; 2= Not in the past 30 days but sometime in the past 6 months; 3= Not in the past 7 days but sometime in the past 30 days; 4= Not today but sometime in the past 7 days; 5= Earlier today; -99= NA/Refused

ElementDescription: In the past 30 days, how many days have you smoked cigarettes?
In the past 30 days, on the days you smoked, how many cigarettes did you smoke per day?
Notes: 1= Less than 1 cigarette per day; 2= 1 cigarette per day; 3= 2 to 5 cigarettes per day; 4= 6 to 10 cigarettes per day; 5= 11 to 20 cigarettes per day; 6= More than 20 cigarettes per day; -99= NA/RF

ElementDescription: In the past 30 days, how many days have you vaped?
In the past 30 days, on the days that you vaped, how many times did you vape per day?
Notes: 0= Less than one time per day; 30= 30 or more; -99= NA/RF

ElementDescription: In the past 30 days, how many days have you smoked cigars?
In the past 30 days, on the days you smoked a cigar, how many cigars did you smoke per day?
Notes: 1= Less than 1 cigar per day; 2= 1 cigar per day; 3= 2 to 5 cigars per day; 4= 6 to 10 cigars per day; 5= 11 to 20 cigars per day; 6= More than 20 cigars per day; -99= NA/RF

ElementDescription: In the past 30 days, how many days have you smoked a pipe?
In the past 30 days, on the days you smoked a pipe, how many bowls filled with tobacco did you smoke per day?
Notes: 1= Less than 1 bowl per day; 2= 1 bowl per day; 3= 2 to 5 bowls per day; 4= 6 to 10 bowls per day; 5= 11 to 20 bowls per day; 6= More than 20 bowls per day; -99= NA/RF

ElementDescription: In the past 30 days, how many days have you smoked a hookah?
In the past 30 days, on the days you smoked a hookah, how many times did you smoke per day?
In the past 30 days, how many days have you used smokeless tobacco or snus?
In the past 30 days, on the days you used smokeless tobacco or snus, how many times did you use each day?
In the past 30 days, how many days have you smoked a bidi or kretek?
In the past 30 days, on the days you smoked, how many bidis or kreteks did you smoke per day?
Notes: 1= Less than 1 bidi or kretek per day; 2= 1 bidi or kretek per day; 3= 2 to 5 bidis or kreteks per day; 4= 6 to 10 bidis or kreteks per day; 5= 11 to 20 bidis or kreteks per day; 6= More than 20 bidis or kreteks per day; -99= NA/RF
